summary: 3 film announcements, 2 TV announcements across multiple trades.

film.title: Hans Christian Andersen
film.announcement: Nikolaj Arcel's Hans Christian Andersen biopic is among the first titles to be supported through Denmark's new production incentive scheme.

film.title: Peluru Senja: The Ghost & the Gun
film.announcement: War drama locks Malaysia theatrical release date and drops trailer.

film.title: My Indian Boyfriend: The Golden Mile
film.announcement: Film lands RFT Films for U.K. and Ireland theatrical distribution.

tv.title: Army of Shadows
tv.announcement: Two Cities Television is developing a TV reimagining of the 1969 war movie, leveraging success from their series 'Backrooms'.

tv.title: Mohini – Khud Se Pyaar
tv.announcement: AI-created Indian musical microdrama unveils debut track 'Angaat Aalay Ka'.
